purpose: Durable repo-managed matrix that records the all-locale Apple HIG localized UI completion state per locale per scoped surface, plus the canonical finding taxonomy. This is a planning/evidence index, not a proof artifact. It does not claim any locale passed.

scoped_surfaces.label: Build Info
scoped_surfaces.evidence_target: committed screenshot artifact under automation/proofs/<slice>/ with manifest.json (sha256 + bytes) and matching committed source

scoped_surfaces.label: Today launch
scoped_surfaces.evidence_target: settled Today shell screenshot with header greeting, focus three, readiness band, and visible nudge copy

scoped_surfaces.label: Root tabs
scoped_surfaces.evidence_target: all root tab labels visible without truncation; reachable; ordered per locale direction

scoped_surfaces.label: Primary empty states
scoped_surfaces.evidence_target: Today/Train/Write/Career/Home/Patterns/Settings empty-state copy reads cleanly in locale

scoped_surfaces.label: Primary actions
scoped_surfaces.evidence_target: primary CTA labels remain idiomatic and recognizable; no truncation; meaning preserved

scoped_surfaces.label: High-risk date/count/plural surfaces
scoped_surfaces.evidence_target: locale-aware Date.FormatStyle / stringsdict pluralization confirmed visually for ranges, counts, and relative dates

scoped_surfaces.label: Dynamic Type + accessibility pass
scoped_surfaces.evidence_target: standard text size + Larger Accessibility Text rendering; accessibility labels/values/hints localized; tab reachability and touch targets preserved

scoped_surfaces.label: RTL-only mirroring
scoped_surfaces.evidence_target: layout mirrored; alignment, navigation affordances, ordered controls, and directional symbols correct; digits inside numbers not reversed; non-direction-bearing artwork not flipped

severity_levels.definition: Visible localized UI fails an Apple HIG requirement in a way that prevents calling the surface UI-ready in that locale. Examples: untranslated visible label, truncated meaning-bearing label, broken RTL mirroring, inaccessible action.

Visible localized UI is degraded but the action remains discoverable. Examples: long compound truncation that loses qualifier, inconsistent terminology across one surface, missed locale-aware date format.
Cosmetic or stylistic issue that does not impair comprehension. Examples: slightly awkward phrasing accepted by reviewer, non-critical glyph fallback.
Observation that is not a defect but should be tracked. Examples: deliberately retained English product term, locale-specific phrasing choice.

blockers: scoped HIG evidence has not been captured for the English source baseline

scoped_surface_status.today-launch: partial (HIG-DE-001 surfaced English evening reflection nudge; source fixed in app-localization-evening-reflection-nudge-routing; rerun screenshot still missing)

blockers: HIG-DE-001 remediation source fix landed but rerun screenshot evidence not yet captured
no committed Build Info screenshot artifact with complete gate fields
no root tab, empty state, primary action, date/count/plural, or Dynamic Type evidence captured under automation/proofs/

open_findings.summary: German Today UI surfaced English evening reflection nudge copy.
observed_evidence: "Close the day with one quick reflection."
open_findings.notes: Source fix shipped under app-localization-evening-reflection-nudge-routing. Finding stays open until a rerun screenshot for the German Today surface is captured under automation/proofs/ with manifest.json. (Re-gated 2026-05-18: source_fix_confirmed=true; awaiting post-fix screenshot capture under app-localization-hig-multisurface-screenshot-capture.)

open_findings.summary: Arabic Career tab label 'المسيرة المهنية' (15 chars) is the longest Career label across all 19 locales; tab-bar truncation risk.
German Write tab label 'Schreiben' (9 chars vs en 5); tab-bar truncation risk.
French Today tab label 'Aujourd'hui' (11 chars vs en 5); longest Today label across all 19 locales; tab-bar truncation risk.
Japanese Train tab label 'トレーニング' (6 katakana chars; ~2x Latin width); tab-bar truncation risk.
Dutch Write tab label 'Schrijven' (9 chars vs en 5); tab-bar truncation risk.
Russian Train tab label 'Тренировка' (10 chars, Cyrillic); tab-bar truncation likely.
Turkish Train tab label 'Antrenman' (9 chars vs en 5); tab-bar truncation risk.
Ukrainian Train tab label 'Тренування' (10 chars, Cyrillic); tab-bar truncation likely.

not_claimed: any locale beyond German is native-reviewed
RTL mirroring for ar has been proven on Owlory surfaces

remediation_slices_queued: app-localization-rtl-sf-symbol-fix (pri 79; closes HIG-AR-001 + HIG-AR-002 in source)
app-localization-hig-multisurface-screenshot-capture (pri 78; preserves screenshot evidence for HIG-DE-001 rerun + all 8 tab-truncation findings)
app-localization-tab-bar-truncation-fix (pri 77; conditional on capture confirming truncation; addresses 8 adaptive-layout findings together)

notes.summary: On 2026-05-18 the project owner recorded internal-reviewer signoff (not native speaker) for the 17 non-German locales in localization/review/<locale>/<locale>-review-return.json (provenance.internal_reviewer_signoff). HIG bucket-gate slices no longer block on native-review intake; their depends_on lists were updated accordingly. per_locale_state below reflects the new gate eligibility: native_review_state still describes the language quality (LLM-drafted), and gate_state moves from blocked-on-native-review to unblocked-pending-screenshot-evidence.

All 4 bucket-gate slices + German re-gate now complete. 10 new open findings + HIG-DE-001 in-progress. 8 of 10 share tab-truncation fix shape. 2 (HIG-AR-001/002) are deterministic RTL SF Symbol defects. Triage queued 3 remediation slices: rtl-sf-symbol-fix, hig-multisurface-screenshot-capture, tab-bar-truncation-fix.

app-localization-rtl-sf-symbol-fix landed source fix for HIG-AR-001 (chevron.right -> chevron.forward in TodayView:566) and HIG-AR-002 (arrow.right.circle -> arrow.forward.circle in WriteView:88,181). Both findings moved from open_findings to in_progress_findings with source_fix_confirmed=true. Closure requires post-fix Arabic screenshot evidence under app-localization-hig-multisurface-screenshot-capture.

in_progress_findings.summary: TodayView 'chevron.right' SF Symbol does not auto-mirror under RTL.
WriteView 'arrow.right.circle' SF Symbol (2 call sites) does not auto-mirror under RTL.
